settings.heading: Smaller boxes. Lighter paper. Less ink.
settings.body: Sustainability in supply means using less, more carefully. We don't make claims we can't back up. Here's what we do, and what we don't.

settings.text:
• Default GSM is the lowest that meets the spec — no over-engineering.
  • All kraft mailers and outer cases are 100% recycled, FSC-certified.
  • Our standard label stock is 85 GSM, not 100 — same performance, 15% less paper per roll.
  • We ship in right-sized boxes (no air filler) where the order allows.
  • Local DCs cut last-mile distance — average customer order travels < 300 km.

• We don't carbon-offset shipping. We think buying offsets is greenwashing; reducing volume is the work.
  • We don't market "eco" SKUs at a premium. If a SKU is greener, it's the default — not a paid upgrade.
  • We don't pretend label adhesives are recyclable. They're not. We're working on a solvent-recoverable line; not ready to ship.
